title: TxCo Package Manifest (v1alpha1)
description: Schema for txco.package.yaml. EDITOR TOOLING / DOCUMENTATION ONLY — this schema is NOT loaded by the txco binary. The Go struct + code validation in the Package System is authoritative (it performs semantic checks this schema cannot express, e.g. that every operations.required name appears as an op:// ref with no colocated compute). See docs/txco-oci-packages.md §8.

apiVersion.description: Manifest API version group (thanks.computer is the project domain).

name.description: Package IDENTITY (name + version only). The publisher namespace, registry, and any 'publisher' attribution are PROVENANCE derived from the resolved ref and recorded in the lockfile — never self-asserted here, so a copied package cannot lie about its origin. The name may be hierarchical (e.g. customer-support/email) but does NOT include the publisher namespace.

kind.description: v1 package kinds. extension/policy-pack/inlet-pack are deferred.

suggestedStack.description: Default name for --as. The CLI still requires an explicit --as when the target is ambiguous.

txco.description: Semver constraint checked against the running txco build version. Advisory when the build version is empty.

operations.description: The op:// resolution contract. See docs/txco-oci-packages.md §4.

bundled.description: Computes that travel WITH the package as colocated <name>.js/.ts. Built at apply time. Listed here for validate/inspect only.

name.description: Matches op://NAME and a colocated source file.

path.description: Path within the package tree to the colocated compute source.

required.description: External op endpoints the installer must wire into txco.yaml operations:. Have no colocated compute.

name.description: Matches op://NAME used by a rule with no colocated compute.

kind.description: How the op is invoked. Advisory.

example.description: Example URL used ONLY as a commented stub in txco.yaml; never wired as a live default.

build.description: Advisory toolchain requirements for building bundled computes at apply time. Checked + warned, not enforced. Moot once prebuilt-wasm packaging lands.

capabilities.description: ADVISORY ONLY in v1 — nothing in the chassis grants or enforces these. Shown at install for human review.

inlets.description: Suggested ingress. Surfaced at install; NOT auto-bound in v1.

requires.description: Reserved for Phase 4 — designed now, NOT resolved in v1.
